name: Evard's Black Tentacles
components: M (a piece of tentacle from a giant octopus or a giant squid)
description: Squirming, ebony tentacles fill a 20-foot Square on ground that you can see within range. For the duration, these tentacles turn the ground in that area into Difficult Terrain. A creature takes 3d6 Bludgeoning damage when it enters the affected area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there. A creature in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take the damage and have the Restrained condition until the spell ends. A creature that starts its turn Restrained by the tentacles takes 3d6 Bludgeoning damage. A Restrained creature can take an action to make a Strength or Dexterity check (its choice) against your spell save DC, ending the condition on a success.
